core_pillars.mission: The 'Master Label' and Version Control. Establishes the unique Metric Identifier and functional 'Why' through standardized taxonomy.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Eliminates 'Identity Ambiguity.' Every logic chain is bound to a cryptographic hash, ensuring non-repudiation.

core_pillars.mission: Utilizing Logic RFC text map files to extract business rules and strategic intent.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Eliminates 'Contextual Hallucination' by ensuring AI never guesses the purpose of data.

core_pillars.mission: Real-time, verifiable checks providing objective mathematical proof of accuracy.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Eliminates 'Logic Drift' and provides Deterministic Certainty for automated decisioning.

core_pillars.mission: Uniform standards maintaining consistency across all business units.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Hardens Logic DNA™ to prevent unauthorized logic mutation.

core_pillars.mission: Capturing diverse perspectives from human leadership to autonomous AI agents.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Prevents 'Perspective Bias' by anchoring logic to specific personas in the SEM layer.

core_pillars.mission: Defined parameters for accuracy that govern how data is interpreted.
core_pillars.risk_mitigation: Prevents 'Operational Error' by ensuring human intent remains sovereign.

file_architecture.label: Metric Manifest
file_architecture.strategic_value: The identity anchor. Contains the ITW_ID, Version, and Business Owner. The primary file for auditability.

file_architecture.label: Semantic Layer
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'Business Why'. Anchors metrics to Stakeholder Personas and contains the SQL expressions.

file_architecture.label: Bridge File
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'If-Then Connector'. Kinetic link mapping input_events to data actions.

file_architecture.label: Logical Data Design
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'Engine & Proof'. Immutable logic carrying the Logic DNA™ Signature.

file_architecture.label: Logical ERD
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'Blueprint'. Guardrails preventing join errors and logic drift.

file_architecture.label: Data Dictionary
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'Map'. High-fidelity source-to-target mapping and technical provenance.

file_architecture.label: Lookup Tables
file_architecture.strategic_value: The 'Universal Translator'. NLP-optimized labeling for AI interfaces.
